subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is, verily, the Promised One mentioned in My Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو الموعود فی کتبی و المذکور
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
